search.query: source:instance_bill | select case when rank_by_product = 1 then ProductName else '' end as "产品",case when rank_by_product = 1 then cast(round(pretaxAmountProduct,3) as varchar) else '' end as "产品总金额" ,  case when rank_by_product_item =1 then item else '' end as "计费项", ListPrice as "单价", round(usage,3) as "使用量",round(coalesce(DeductedByResourcePackage,0)) as "资源包抵扣用量",round(PretaxGrossAmount ,3)as "原始金额",round(InvoiceDiscount,3) as "优惠金额", round(DeductedByCoupons,3) as "优惠券优惠金额",round(DeductedByCashCoupons,3) as "代金券抵扣",round(DeductedByPrepaidCard,3) as "储值卡抵扣" ,round(PaymentAmount,3) as "现金支付",round(OutstandingAmount,3) as "未接清金额",round(PretaxAmount,3) as "应付金额" from(select *, rank() over(partition by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc) as rank_by_product,rank() over(partition by productname,item order by pretaxAmount desc ) as rank_by_product_item  from( select *, sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname) as pretaxAmountProduct,sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname,item) as pretaxAmountItem from (select ProductName, concat(BillingItem , '(',UsageUnit,')') as item, ListPrice, sum(Usage) as usage,sum(DeductedByResourcePackage) as DeductedByResourcePackage, sum(DeductedByCashCoupons) as DeductedByCashCoupons , sum(DeductedByCoupons) as DeductedByCoupons, sum(DeductedByPrepaidCard) as DeductedByPrepaidCard, sum(InvoiceDiscount) as InvoiceDiscount, sum(OutstandingAmount) as OutstandingAmount, sum(PaymentAmount) as PaymentAmount, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount  from log group by productname, item, listprice))) order by PretaxAmountProduct desc,PretaxAmountitem desc, pretaxamount  desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: source:instance_bill | select case when rank_by_product = 1 then ProductName else '' end as "产品",case when rank_by_product = 1 then cast(round(pretaxAmountProduct,3) as varchar) else '' end as "产品总金额" ,  case when rank_by_product_item =1 then item else '' end as "计费项", ListPrice as "单价", round(usage,3) as "使用量",round(coalesce(DeductedByResourcePackage,0)) as "资源包抵扣用量",round(PretaxGrossAmount ,3)as "原始金额",round(InvoiceDiscount,3) as "优惠金额", round(DeductedByCoupons,3) as "优惠券优惠金额",round(DeductedByCashCoupons,3) as "代金券抵扣",round(DeductedByPrepaidCard,3) as "储值卡抵扣" ,round(PaymentAmount,3) as "现金支付",round(OutstandingAmount,3) as "未接清金额",round(PretaxAmount,3) as "应付金额" from(select *, rank() over(partition by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc) as rank_by_product,rank() over(partition by productname,item order by pretaxAmount desc ) as rank_by_product_item  from( select *, sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname) as pretaxAmountProduct,sum(pretaxAmount) over(partition by productname,item) as pretaxAmountItem from (select ProductName, concat(BillingItem , '(',UsageUnit,')') as item, ListPrice, sum(Usage) as usage,sum(DeductedByResourcePackage) as DeductedByResourcePackage, sum(DeductedByCashCoupons) as DeductedByCashCoupons , sum(DeductedByCoupons) as DeductedByCoupons, sum(DeductedByPrepaidCard) as DeductedByPrepaidCard, sum(InvoiceDiscount) as InvoiceDiscount, sum(OutstandingAmount) as OutstandingAmount, sum(PaymentAmount) as PaymentAmount, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount ,sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount  from log group by productname, item, listprice))) order by PretaxAmountProduct desc,PretaxAmountitem desc, pretaxamount  desc limit 1000

search.query: ProductCode:oss| select ts_predicate_arma(time, num, 5, 1, 1) from ( select to_unixtime(time) as time, num from( select (time_series(__time__,'1d','%Y-%m-%d','0')) as time , sum(pretaxamount) as num from log group by time order by time)) limit 10000
search.tokenQuery: ProductCode:${name}| select ts_predicate_arma(time, num, 5, 1, 1) from ( select to_unixtime(time) as time, num from( select (time_series(__time__,'1d','%Y-%m-%d','0')) as time , sum(pretaxamount) as num from log group by time order by time)) limit 10000

search.query: source:bill |select productname as "产品名称",round(diffreal[1],3) as "折后费用(元)",concat(cast(round(diffreal[1]/sum(diffreal[1])over() * 100,2) as varchar),'%') as "产品费用占比",concat(cast(round(diffreal[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%') as "同比上月(折后费用)" , round( diffgross[1],3) as "原始消费(元)",concat(cast(round( diffgross[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%')  as "同比上月(原始消费)" , (days) as "30天费用趋势" from( select productname, compare(pretaxamount,2592000) as diffreal, compare(PretaxGrossAmount,2592000) as diffgross,arbitrary(days) as days from( select productname, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount, array_agg(pretaxAmount) as days from(select productname, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from log group by productname ,t order by t  )group by productname) group by productname) order by diffreal[1] desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: * |select productname as "产品名称",round(diffreal[1],3) as "实际应付(元)",concat(cast(round(diffreal[1]/sum(diffreal[1])over() * 100,2) as varchar),'%') as "产品费用/总费用",concat(cast(round(diffreal[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%') as "实际应付(同比上月)" , round( diffgross[1],3) as "原始消费(元)",concat(cast(round( diffgross[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%')  as "原始消费(同比上月)" , (days) as "30天费用趋势" from( select productname, compare(pretaxamount,604800) as diffreal, compare(PretaxGrossAmount,604800) as diffgross,arbitrary(days) as days from( select productname, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount, array_agg(pretaxAmount) as days from(select productname, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from log group by productname ,t order by t  )group by productname) group by productname) order by diffreal[1] desc limit 1000

search.query: source:bill|select productname as "付费类型",round(diffreal[1],3) as "折后费用(元)",concat(cast(round(diffreal[1]/sum(diffreal[1])over() * 100,2) as varchar),'%') as "占比",concat(cast(round(diffreal[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%') as "同比上月(折后费用)" , round( diffgross[1],3) as "原始消费(元)",concat(cast(round( diffgross[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%')  as "同比上月(原始消费)" , (days) as "消费趋势" from( select productname, compare(pretaxamount,2592000) as diffreal, compare(PretaxGrossAmount,2592000) as diffgross,arbitrary(days) as days from( select productname, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount, array_agg(PretaxAmount) as days from(select SubscriptionType as ProductName, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from log group by SubscriptionType ,t order by t  )group by productname) group by productname) order by diffreal[1] desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: * |select productname as "付费类型",round(diffreal[1],3) as "实际应付(元)",concat(cast(round(diffreal[1]/sum(diffreal[1])over() * 100,2) as varchar),'%') as "占比",concat(cast(round(diffreal[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%') as "实际应付(同比上月)" , round( diffgross[1],3) as "原始消费(元)",concat(cast(round( diffgross[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%')  as "原始消费(同比上月)" ,cardinality(days) as "趋势" from( select productname, compare(pretaxamount,604800) as diffreal, compare(PretaxGrossAmount,604800) as diffgross,arbitrary(days) as days from( select productname, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount, array_agg(t) as days from(select SubscriptionType as ProductName, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from log group by SubscriptionType ,t order by t  )group by productname) group by productname) order by diffreal[1] desc limit 1000

display.displayName: 智能诊断，选中时间段后查看结果

search.query: * | select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from log group by day  order by day limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: * | select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from log group by day  order by day limit 1000

search.query: source:bill|select productname as "产品名称",round(diffreal[1],3) as "折后费用(元)",concat(cast(round(diffreal[1]/sum(diffreal[1])over() * 100,2) as varchar),'%') as "产品费用占比",concat(cast(coalesce(round(diffreal[5]*100-100),2) as varchar),'%') as "同比-1天",concat(cast(round(coalesce(diffreal[6]*100-100,2)) as varchar),'%') as "同比-2天",concat(cast(round(coalesce(diffreal[7]*100-100),2) as varchar),'%') as "同比-3天"   from( select productname, compare(pretaxamount,86400,172800,259200) as diffreal from( select productname, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount)    from log group by productname) group by productname) order by diffreal[1] desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: * |select productname as "产品名称",round(diffreal[1],3) as "实际应付(元)",concat(cast(round(diffreal[1]/sum(diffreal[1])over() * 100,2) as varchar),'%') as "占比",concat(cast(round(diffreal[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%') as "实际应付(同比上月)" , round( diffgross[1],3) as "原始消费(元)",concat(cast(round( diffgross[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%')  as "原始消费(同比上月)" , (days) as "30天费用趋势" from( select productname, compare(pretaxamount,604800) as diffreal, compare(PretaxGrossAmount,604800) as diffgross,arbitrary(days) as days from( select productname, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount, array_agg(pretaxAmount) as days from(select productname, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from log group by productname ,t order by t  )group by productname) group by productname) order by diffreal[1] desc limit 1000

search.query: source:bill|select item as "付费类型",round(diffreal[1],3) as "折后费用(元)",concat(cast(round(diffreal[1]/sum(diffreal[1])over() * 100,2) as varchar),'%') as "占比",concat(cast(round(diffreal[5]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%') as "同比-1天" ,concat(cast(round(diffreal[6]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%') as "同比-2天",concat(cast(round(diffreal[7]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%') as "同比-3天"      from( select item, compare(pretaxamount,86400,172800,259200) as diffreal  from( select item, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount  from log  group by item) group by item) order by diffreal[1] desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: * |select productname as "付费类型",round(diffreal[1],3) as "实际应付(元)",concat(cast(round(diffreal[1]/sum(diffreal[1])over() * 100,2) as varchar),'%') as "占比",concat(cast(round(diffreal[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%') as "实际应付(同比上月)" , round( diffgross[1],3) as "原始消费(元)",concat(cast(round( diffgross[3]*100-100,2) as varchar),'%')  as "原始消费(同比上月)" ,cardinality(days) as "趋势" from( select productname, compare(pretaxamount,604800) as diffreal, compare(PretaxGrossAmount,604800) as diffgross,arbitrary(days) as days from( select productname, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount, array_agg(t) as days from(select SubscriptionType as ProductName, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, sum(PretaxGrossAmount) as PretaxGrossAmount ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from log group by SubscriptionType ,t order by t  )group by productname) group by productname) order by diffreal[1] desc limit 1000

display.displayName: 异常账单时间点，点击产品名称查看右详情

search.query: source:bill | select name as "异常产品名称", date_format(from_unixtime(r.t),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as "异常时间点",round(r.d,3) as "实际费用", round(r.pred,3) as "预期正常费用", round( r.pred-r.d,3) as "异常差额" from(select res.name,filter(cast(zip(res.ts, res.probs,res.ds,res.preds) as array(row(t double, prob double, d double, pred double))), r -> r.prob >=1) as anormly from ( select ts_anomaly_filter(cast(ProductCode as varchar), res[1], res[2], res[3], res[6], 100, 0) as res from ( select ProductCode, array_transpose(ts_predicate_arma(time, num, 5, 1, 1)) as res from ( select time, ProductCode, num from( select time,map_concat(m, map(diff,transform(diff, x -> 0)))all from( select time,m,array_except(all_keys,map_keys(m)) as diff from( select time, map_agg(ProductCode, num) as m , arbitrary(all_keys) as all_keys from( select time, ProductCode, num, filter(array_distinct(array_agg(ProductCode) over()),x -> x is not null) as all_keys from( select to_unixtime(time) as time , productcode,num from(select (time_series(__time__,'1d','%Y-%m-%d','0')) as time, ProductCode , sum(pretaxamount) as num from log group by time, ProductCode order by time ))) group by time))), unnest(all) as t(ProductCode,num)) group by ProductCode ) )), unnest(anormly) as t(r) order by r.t desc
search.tokenQuery: * | select name as "异常产品名", date_format(from_unixtime(k),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as "异常时间点"  from(select res.name,map_filter(map(res.ts, res.probs), (k,v) -> v >=1) as anormly from ( select ts_anomaly_filter(cast(ProductCode as varchar), res[1], res[2], res[3], res[6], 100, 0) as res from ( select ProductCode, array_transpose(ts_predicate_arma(time, num, 5, 1, 1)) as res from ( select time, ProductCode, num from( select time,map_concat(m, map(diff,transform(diff, x -> 0)))all from( select time,m,array_except(all_keys,map_keys(m)) as diff from( select time, map_agg(ProductCode, num) as m , arbitrary(all_keys) as all_keys from( select time, ProductCode, num, array_agg(ProductCode) over() as all_keys from( select to_unixtime(time) as time , productcode,num from(select (time_series(__time__,'1d','%Y-%m-%d','0')) as time, ProductCode , sum(pretaxamount) as num from log group by time, ProductCode order by time ))) group by time))), unnest(all) as t(ProductCode,num)) group by ProductCode ) )), unnest(anormly) as t(k,v) order by name, k
